description: Federal prosecutors released surveillance video showing Cole Tomas Allen attempting to storm the White House Correspondents' Dinner, armed with guns and knives, to assassinate Donald Trump. The footage depicts Allen breaching a Secret Service checkpoint at the Washington Hilton Hotel. He exchanged gunfire with agents, injuring one officer, before being apprehended.

title: 2 days after polling ends, commercial LPG cylinder rates hiked by Rs 993
'Why shouldn’t I?': Trump signals troop cuts in Italy, Spain over Iran conflict
description: President Trump is considering reducing US troop presence in Italy and Spain, citing their lack of support for the Iran war and Strait of Hormuz efforts. This move signals a widening rift with European allies over military objectives and burden-sharing within Nato.

title: Behind BJP dominance: No rival on the Right, Opposition divided, explains Ruchir Sharma

Virat Kohli loses cool, confronts umpire after controversial Patidar dismissal
description: Virat Kohli was seen in an animated exchange with an umpire during the Gujarat Titans vs. Royal Challengers Bengaluru IPL match. The incident occurred after Rajat Patidar's dismissal, with replays appearing inconclusive. Despite the controversy, the third umpire upheld the on-field decision, leaving Kohli and the RCB dugout visibly frustrated.

Dhurandhar 2 box office day 43: Ranveer Singh starrer nears Baahubali 2 global mark
description: Ranveer Singh's latest release, 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge', is generating immense buzz as it edges closer to 'Baahubali 2's global box office achievement. Over the past six weeks, this espionage thriller has earned an impressive Rs 1783.66 crore globally, and with Maharashtra showing particular enthusiasm, it might just outstrip the Rs 1,788.06 crore milestone by this weekend. Read on to know more in detail.

description: Shikhar Dhawan champions young Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, emphasizing performance over age. Dhawan lauded the teenager's fearless batting against top bowlers, a rarity at his age. Sooryavanshi's impressive IPL 2026 stats, including 400 runs at a 238.10 strike rate and 37 sixes, back Dhawan's praise. However, Dhawan acknowledges the challenge of breaking into India's strong top order.

title: Termination of minor’s pregnancy: In past, courts allowed Govt stand of carrying foetus to full term
'Son found out about her affair': Hyderabad techie jumps to death in lake, wife arrested for abetment
description: Bachupally police have apprehended a woman and her alleged lover for abetting the suicide of her husband, a techie. The deceased reportedly took his life after discovering his wife's affair and the alleged online sharing of private videos. The investigation is ongoing following the family's complaint.

description: President Trump dismissed reports of wearing a bulletproof vest, joking about the added weight. He acknowledged security considerations but expressed reluctance to appear overly protected. Trump stated he avoids dwelling on personal security threats to remain effective in his duties, following an attempted assassination at a White House event.

title: Row over decomposed body at morgue: Woman’s sons among 12 held for ‘assault’ on doctors, staff
11cm in 1 hour: Deluge could have filled 30,000 pools, two-thirds of Bengaluru’s lakes
description: Bengaluru experienced its wettest April day on Wednesday, with over 11cm of rain, equivalent to nearly 10% of its annual rainfall. This deluge, estimated at 20-22 million cubic metres, could have met the city's water needs for a fortnight.

title: Death note, 7-min video, Rs 25 lakh spent to rebuild relationship: How Gujarat man’s suicide case took a chilling turn; wife arrested for abetment
description: A man's suicide in Ahmedabad has been brought to light by a distressing video and a detailed note. The 43-year-old alleged emotional turmoil and family disputes, accusing his wife of infidelity and naming several individuals. Police have arrested his wife following a complaint, with investigations ongoing into the allegations.

D4vd case update: Celeste Rivas’ death certificate lists pregnancy status unknown
description: Celeste Rivas Hernandez's death certificate has been updated, now stating her pregnancy status in the year prior to her death is unknown, a change from previous reports. The document also confirms her cause of death as "multiple penetrating injuries" and manner as "homicide," with other details like the exact injury circumstances now listed as unknown.

3-layer security grid in place: 1,500 personnel guard Kolkata strong rooms ahead of counting day
description: Kolkata's 22 strong rooms are under a robust three-layered security system involving CAPF and Kolkata Police, with 1,500 personnel on duty per shift. Across the state, over 200 CAPF companies and 7,500 Bengal Police personnel are safeguarding 294 strong rooms and 77 counting centres. Strict protocols are in place to prevent unauthorized access and maintain peace on counting day.

US tightens visa rules, requires applicants to declare no persecution concerns in home country
description: US embassies now require nonimmigrant visa applicants to declare they don't fear persecution back home. This new rule, aimed at preventing asylum claims upon arrival, asks applicants if they've faced harm or fear it upon return. Experts warn this could force individuals into dangerous migration routes, jeopardizing their safety and families.

New US visa rule: Effective immediately, applicants must affirm no fear of returning home
description: America's Trump administration has introduced a new visa rule. Diplomats will now question visa applicants about fearing their home country. This aims to curb asylum claims through the visa system.  Applicants must deny fearing harm to proceed.  This affects tourist, student, and business visas.  Immigration experts express concerns about vulnerable individuals.

title: Candace Owens denies murder accusation claims amid Andrew Kolvet chat leak
description: Candace Owens faced fresh online backlash after a strange Charlie Kirk show clip and a leaked chat screenshot went viral. A controversial line from the chat sparked strong reactions, but Owens said it was taken out of context and meant as a joke. The debate now centers on authenticity, editing, and whether the full story is being shown.

title: Dianna Russini scandal: New allegations emerge amid Mike Vrabel controversy
description: Controversy around Dianna Russini has intensified after unverified allegations linked her to multiple coaches following viral photos with Mike Vrabel. An alleged former scout’s claim added fuel, though no evidence supports it. Russini’s exit from The Athletic and social media has raised questions. Meanwhile, legal expert Michael McCann noted potential privacy issues surrounding how the photos were obtained.
